name: GLOBAL TEK FABRICATION CO., Ltd.
summary: GLOBAL TEK FABRICATION CO., Ltd. manufactures and sells precision parts and subassemblies. It offers products for manufacturers of airbag inflators, steering systems, engines renovation systems, EGRs, turbochargers, DCTs, belt tension systems, assembly cam shaft systems, AEBs, ELSDs, transmission system components, etc., as well as jack heads, oil servers, and heat exchange systems. The company also provides products for use in various industrial applications, including industrial instrumentation, wafer fab equipment, bicycles, and aviation industry. It operates in Asia, the United States, Europe, Canada, Mexico, South America, Brazil, and internationally. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
